key_points.text: Customer disputed a $35 overdraft fee they believed was incorrect.
Agent agreed to a one-time courtesy waiver of the fee.
Customer acknowledged the outcome positively before the call ended.

commitments.text: Agent submitted a one-time courtesy request to waive the $35 overdraft fee, expected to post within 3 business days.
Agent to email the customer the current fee schedule the same day.

disclosures.text: Call-recording notice provided at the start of the call (quality and training).

open_actions.text: Confirm the $35 fee waiver posts to the account within 3 business days.

data_gaps: One agent segment (seg=5) was inaudible and could not be summarized.
narrative: On 2026-07-15, customer ****5678 called (interaction INT-7741) about a $35 overdraft fee they believed was incorrect. The agent gave the standard call-recording notice, then agreed to submit a one-time courtesy request to waive the $35 fee, expected to post within 3 business days, and committed to email the current fee schedule the same day. One agent segment was inaudible and is noted as a data gap. The customer acknowledged the outcome positively before the call ended. Informational summary only; not advice and not a determination.
